title: The Five Elders Descend
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Nusjuro, Unknown person #6, Luffy as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Kizaru delivered a killing blow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I saw it myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He should... be dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: could he have set up a dead man's switch...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that this message would play upon the death of his main body?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That seems likely...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have no way of knowing what he will say.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we can just pinpoint the source of this broadcast...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only location that seems plausible is the Labo-stratum on Egghead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's currently protected by that barrier of his.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What should we do for the remaining nine and a half minutes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: kata

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We could get inventing. There's so much to do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How about some coffee?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Dressrossa, New World

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you hear that?! This is Dr. vegapunk we're talking about!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he's trying to tell the entire world something, it must be a big deal!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get a visual transponder snail out here!! Put up a screen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hurry, we only have 10 minutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Wiseman Luffy-Land kidnapped?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's happening?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you guys trusted another bad article about Lucy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could also calculate the probability of interference happening...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got the video ready!! Is that vegapunk?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Foosha Village, East Blue

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's this all about? I thought it was just gonna be more news badmouthing luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A visual transgender snail?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If only the village had one!! How about it, Mayor?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who's gonna pay for that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Raising it wouldn't be free, y'know! Isn't having audio enough?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Water Seven, Grand Line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wake up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Can I be Good!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YAWW ALICE - prepare to screen the message.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, Mr. President. It's already playing in the room next door.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Screens for each dock are also being prepared.

dialogue.speaker: Nusjuro
dialogue.text: Iceberg's secretary ALICE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's night time, but considering the importance of this event,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A summons has been issued notifying all citizens to be at a screen within 10 minutes. Is there anything else?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: World Economic Journal

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What's with this feed?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's being related through Navi frequencies, but it's unencribed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where are UFFY-SAN and the others?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be a Ditz! Look at the clock in the background.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: that isn't the current time at egghead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This must've been pre-recorded!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, the buster call is bound to have...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: reduced the island to a sea of flames by now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: West blue

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard his mind was a cut above the rest, but this isn't what I expected!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's Dr. Vegaspunk in the flesh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: North Blue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The man who lit up the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: South Blue

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's going through all this trouble; what does he want the world to know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it might be the invention of the century or something!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 56 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
